headline: Fitch Rates NSTAR Electric Company's Debentures 'A'
summary: Fitch Ratings has assigned an 'A' rating to NSTAR Electric Company's proposed senior unsecured debenture issuance.The debentures rank pari passu with NEC's existing senior unsecured debt. Net...
